Training compute notes: OpenAI says this is a version of GPT-5. The meaning of this is not completely clear, but likely means a shared base model and a similar/overlapping post-training history. But it is not clear whether 5-codex was produced via additional fine-tuning of a published GPT-5 checkpoint.
Name: GPT 5 Codex (High)

Training compute notes: Flagship model from a leading developer in mid-2025; very likely it used >1e25 FLOP.
Name: Opus 4.5 (High)

Training compute notes:
Likely around 6e25 [CI: 2e25 to 2e26] FLOP. See document below for details

https://docs.google.com/document/d/1V2jIk365LnhH4WDoCw5dYJjZr1Htw8IHaK1noMf5Y48/edit?tab=t.z871imftkus
Name: GPT 5 (High)

Training compute notes:
We think that RL relative to pre-compute is between our estimate for o3 (10% of pre-training) and the 100% implied by this slide in the launch ( https://archive.is/f0vJU ). Assuming the same pre-training as Grok 3 (also implied by that slide, and much more consistent) and that Grok 3 used a tenth as much RL, we get:

2 * (grok3/1.1) in the high case (rl is 10% of grok 3, so grok3/1.1 is grok3 precompute, and in this case twice that is grok 4)
1.1 * (grok3/1.01) in the low case
The geometric mean is (rounded to one sig fig): 5e26
Name: Grok 4

Training compute notes:
"The training run for gpt-oss-120b required 2.1 million H100-hours to complete"
(2.1e6 hours)*(1,979 H100 FLOP/s)*(30% utilization)*(60*60) = 4.49e24
They also do post training similar to o3, which we assume adds at least 10% as much compute, so we multiply this estimate by 1.1 to get 4.94e24
Name: GPT OSS 120B (High)

Training compute notes: Assuming the additional post-training contributed between 1% and 100% of Kimi K2's training compute (which we confidently estimate at 2.976e+24), we get a range of 3.0e24 to 6.0e24, and a geometric mean of 4.2e24.
Name: Kimi K2 Thinking

Training compute notes: 6 FLOP/parameter/token * 32000000000 active parameters [very likely assumption - everything else is reported to be same as at GLM 4.5] * 23000000000000 tokens = 4.42e24 FLOP
Name: GLM 4.6
